description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional sofa with a modern and inviting design, upholstered in a light beige or off-white fabric. The sofa features thick, plush seat and back cushions that appear loose and generously filled, providing a soft and comfortable seating experience. The sectional includes a chaise lounge extension on one end, ideal for lounging or stretching out. The armrests are straight, padded, and of medium height, seamlessly integrated into the overall silhouette. The sofa is supported by slender, black metal legs that are slightly angled and positioned at the corners, giving it a light and elevated appearance. The upholstery is smooth and solid in color, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, contributing to its clean and contemporary aesthetic.
description: A large, L-shaped sectional sofa with plush, loose cushions and light beige upholstery, supported by slim black metal legs. The design is modern, comfortable, and visually clean.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full L-shape, plush seat and back cushions, and the chaise lounge extension on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chaise lounge section and the depth of the seat cushions, with armrest and backrest details visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the uniformity of the back cushions, as well as the slim black legs.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite end, focusing on the armrest and the end of the chaise lounge, with a clear view of the sofa's height and cushion arrangement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Seven loose, plush cushions: four back cushions and three seat cushions, all uniform in size and arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests of medium height, integrated into the sofa's frame with a clean, modern profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Six slender, black metal legs positioned at the corners and sectional junctions, slightly angled and exposed, providing an elevated and airy look.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with four loose, uniform cushions, continuous along the sectional with no tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth fabric upholstery in a light beige color with no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
